vocab.meaning: người thích làm việc khó khăn/khổ cực (nghĩa bóng: rất kiên trì với trò chơi khó)
vocab.example: When it came to jigsaw puzzles, I was a glutton for punishment, spending hours trying to fit a thousand pieces together.

vocab.word: have a whale of a time
vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: My siblings and I would have a whale of a time building sandcastles whenever we visited the coast.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui/sự thú vị từ việc gì đó
vocab.example: I really got a kick out of performing magic tricks for my relatives during family reunions.

vocab.word: be lost in one's own world
vocab.meaning: mải mê trong thế giới riêng của mình
vocab.example: Give me a set of paints and I would be completely lost in my own world for the entire afternoon.

vocab.meaning: bất cứ khi nào có cơ hội
vocab.example: As a child, I would head to the local library at every opportunity to satisfy my hunger for adventure stories.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó không làm những việc nghịch ngợm/phá phách
vocab.example: Playing hide-and-seek was a great way to keep us out of mischief during the long summer holidays.

vocab.word: have the time of one's life
vocab.meaning: có những giây phút tuyệt vời nhất đời
vocab.example: I was having the time of my life whenever we went camping and roasted marshmallows over a fire.

vocab.word: do something to one's heart's content
vocab.meaning: làm việc gì đó cho đến khi thỏa lòng
vocab.example: We were allowed to run around the playground to our heart's content until the sun went down.

vocab.meaning: thịnh hành, rất phổ biến (nói về xu hướng trò chơi lúc đó)
vocab.example: Collecting trading cards was all the rage when I was in primary school, and I spent all my pocket money on them.

vocab.meaning: với sự nhiệt tình và say mê
vocab.example: Every weekend, I would practice my karate moves with gusto, dreaming of becoming a black belt one day.
